data.content: Plan review requested revisions. Two gaps need to be addressed before implementation. First, the proposed canonical ArtifactTarget/alias mapping does not account for the existing legacy output value 'remote', which is still supported by OutputMode::Remote and tested in profile_tests.rs; the plan must preserve that compatibility explicitly. Second, the runtime prompt path is not fully covered: compatibility prompts are currently rendered into profile.action_prompts up front and claim/run paths read those stored strings via action_prompt::render_for_profile and poll_claim::prompt_body_for_state, so changing build_prompt_params/render_prompt_body alone is not enough to satisfy the requirement that prompt rendering consume resolved per-step output metadata at runtime. Please revise the plan to name the concrete runtime call sites/data flow that will switch from profile.outputs/pre-rendered profile prompts to StepMetadata.output, and include regression coverage for that path.
